title: geum parviflorum
intro: Geum parviflorum, also known as the small-flowered avens or dwarf avens, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the rose family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Geum parviflorum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
